name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift together flour and cream of tartar.
4. Gradually add the sifted mixture to the creaming mixture.
5. Stir in buttermilk and vanilla.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Sprinkle with sugar.
8. Bake at 425°F until golden brown, about 10-12 minutes.
